description_long: This object consists of a group of six distinct traffic signs, each mounted on a vertical post. The signs include a blue 'P' parking sign, a yellow diamond 'DEAD END' warning sign, a blue square accessible parking sign with a wheelchair symbol, a red octagonal 'STOP' sign, a small white rectangular 'NO PARKING ANY TIME' sign with red text, and a red and white triangular 'YIELD' sign. The posts are cylindrical and appear to be made of metal, supporting the signs at varying heights. The signs themselves are made of flat, colored metal or plastic panels with printed or embossed text and symbols. The group is arranged in a row, showcasing a variety of common urban traffic control and informational signage. The surfaces of the signs are smooth and likely have a semi-glossy finish to enhance visibility and weather resistance.
description: A set of six urban traffic signs on metal posts, featuring various shapes, colors, and regulatory or informational messages.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six traffic signs with their faces, text, and symbols clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the signs and posts, with minimal detail visible except the depth of the panels.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the signs and mounting brackets, with no text or symbols visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the signs and posts, similar to view 1.
